rulings.Case Title: BARBERA VS WMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: OVERRULE Demurrer to first cause of action CLRA (Consumer Legal Remedies Act). Claim not time barred and Defendant failed to sustain its burden of showing none of the conduct alleged violated provisions of CLRA cited. OVERRULE Demurrer to second cause of action 17200. Claim not time barred and Defendant failed to sustain its burden of showing that none of the conduct alleged was unlawful as a matter of law. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: BARBERA VS WMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: & Ntc Of Mtn By Defts To Strike Complt
rulings.Rulings: DENY Motion to strike the word "fraud" Defendant failed to include in notice and word neither irrelevant nor improper. DENY Motion to strike prayer for punitive damages. Punitive damages authorized by CLRA. (CW)
